errors.dbConnectionFailed: Database connection failed. Check your connection settings.
errors.dbInitFailed: Database initialization failed. Check server logs.
errors.dbWipeFailed: Database wipe failed. Check server logs.
errors.authAccountInactive: Account is not active. Contact administrator.
errors.authDbUnavailable: Database is not available. Set up the database first in Settings → Database Setup.
errors.authTokenMissing: Authentication required. Provide a Bearer token or cookie.
errors.authProviderDbNotReady: Cannot switch to database authentication — database is not initialized. Set up the database first.
errors.authProviderSaveFailed: Failed to save authentication provider configuration.
errors.superAdminPasswordRequired: Current password and new password are required.
errors.superAdminPasswordWeak: New password does not meet security requirements.
errors.superAdminLoginFailed: SuperAdmin login failed. Please try again.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.authRateLimitExceeded: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
errors.logInvalidType: Invalid log type. Must be 'ui' or 'api'.
errors.logInvalidStorage: Invalid storage mode. Must be 'file' or 'database'.
errors.logDbNotAvailable: Database logging is not available. Set up the database first.
errors.snConnectionTestFailed: Failed to perform ServiceNow connection test.
errors.snConnectionRequired: ServiceNow connection is not configured. Set up the connection in Configuration → Connection.
errors.snStatsFailed: Failed to retrieve ServiceNow dashboard statistics.
errors.snIncidentsFetchFailed: Failed to fetch incidents from ServiceNow.
errors.snSyncFailed: Failed to synchronize data from ServiceNow.
